reporting_owners.officer_title: Chief Financial Officer & Senior Vice President - Finance

non_derivative_transactions.security_title: Common stock, par value $0.01 per share

footnotes.F1: In connection with the vesting and settlement of restricted stock units through the issuance of common stock of the Issuer ("Common Stock") pursuant to the Antero Midstream Corporation Long Term Incentive Plan, the Issuer withheld Common Stock that would otherwise have been issued to the Reporting Person to satisfy his tax withholding obligations. The number of shares of Common Stock withheld was determined based on the closing price per share of Common Stock on January 20, 2021.
